title: AI and Misinformation

modules.title: AI-Generated False Content
modules.sub: How AI creates and amplifies convincing false narratives
modules.description: Learners examine how large language models, deepfakes, and synthetic media are used to fabricate text, images, audio, and video at scale. They analyse real-world case studies of AI-generated misinformation to understand the mechanisms behind its production. By the end of the module, learners can categorise different types of false AI-generated content and explain how each spreads.

modules.title: Detection and Verification Tools
modules.sub: Practical tools and techniques for authenticating digital information
modules.description: Learners get hands-on with leading detection tools, including AI content classifiers, reverse image search, and metadata analysis platforms. They work through guided exercises to verify the authenticity of suspect articles, images, and audio clips using a structured verification workflow. Learners leave with a reusable verification checklist they can apply immediately in their professional context.

modules.title: Information Warfare Tactics
modules.sub: Strategic use of misinformation to manipulate public opinion
modules.description: Learners investigate how state and non-state actors deliberately deploy AI-generated misinformation as an instrument of influence and disruption. They map the anatomy of coordinated inauthentic behaviour campaigns, identifying the goals, channels, and amplification strategies involved. Through scenario analysis, learners develop the ability to recognise when misinformation is part of a deliberate, organised campaign rather than organic error.

modules.title: Building Media Literacy
modules.sub: Developing critical habits to evaluate and resist false information
modules.description: Learners design a personal and organisational media literacy framework tailored to their professional environment, drawing on principles of critical thinking and source evaluation. They explore how cognitive biases make individuals and teams vulnerable to misinformation and practise targeted strategies to counteract those biases. The module culminates in learners producing a short action plan for raising misinformation awareness within their own organisation.

synopsis: Understand how AI can create and spread misinformation at scale. Develop skills to identify false content and verify information authenticity.
